title: UK Public Sector GitHub Organisation Mapping
description: Maps GitHub organisations to UK public sector organisations.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 date the file was last updated

type.description: gov_uk: central government identified by GOV.UK slug. english_council: English local authority identified by planning.data.gov.uk reference. other: identified by Wikidata ID only.

govuk_slug.description: GOV.UK organisation slug (gov_uk entries only). Use with the GOV.UK Organisations API: GET https://www.gov.uk/api/organisations/{govuk_slug}

england_planning_data_reference.description: Local authority reference code from planning.data.gov.uk (english_council entries only). Use with the planning data API: GET https://www.planning.data.gov.uk/entity.json?dataset=local-authority&reference={england_planning_data_reference}

wikidata_id.description: Wikidata entity ID. Mandatory for other entries; present where known for gov_uk and english_council. Use with the Wikidata API: https://www.wikidata.org/entity/{wikidata_id}

site_slug.description: URL slug for the organisation's page on publicsectorcodebyorg.co.uk

site_url.description: URL of the organisation's page on publicsectorcodebyorg.co.uk

github_accounts.description: GitHub organisation names belonging to this organisation. Match against the 'owner' field in the UK X-Gov Open Source Repo Scraper dataset.
